'''Zac Lipowicz''' is a [[Poland national rugby league team|Poland]] international [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sr}} forward for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]].

He has previously played for the [[Penrith Panthers]] in the [[National Rugby League]] (NRL).

==Background==
Zac Lipowicz graduated through the [[Penrith Panthers]] system, playing in their [[Harold Matthews Cup|Harold Matthews]], [[S. G. Ball Cup|SG Ball]], [[Laurie Daley Cup]] and [[Jersey Flegg Cup|Jersey Flegg]] sides.<ref>[https://18thman.com/players/zac-lipowicz/ Zac Lipowicz]</ref>

He is a trained professional [[carpenter]].<ref>[https://www.news.com.au/sport/nrl/sweet-16-meet-the-nrl-rookie-who-rocks-up-to-panthers-training-covered-in-mud-after-working-as-a-carpenter/news-story/24ff3f0a4c45438417504b1e91005ba9 Sweet 16: Meet the NRL rookie who rocks up to Panthers training covered in mud after working as a carpenter]</ref><ref>[https://www.canberratimes.com.au/story/9053111/tools-down-as-chippie-zac-lipowicz-finally-cracks-nrl/ Tools down as chippie Zac Lipowicz finally cracks NRL]</ref>

==Career==
===Club career===
Lipowicz made his debut in May 2023 for [[Penrith Panthers|Penrith]] against the [[New Zealand Warriors]] in the [[2024 NSW Cup season|NSW Cup]]. He played nearly 50 reserve grade games for the [[Penrith Panthers|Panthers]] between 2023 and 2025.<ref>[https://www.totalrl.com/penrith-panthers-zac-lipowicz-set-for-super-league-move/ Penrith Panthers’ Zac Lipowicz set for Super League move]</ref>

He played in two pre-season [[National Rugby League]] trial games for Penrith in 2025.<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/penrith-panthers-zac-lipowicz-transfer-catalans-dragons Penrith Panthers forward set for Super League move in 2026 with new club named]</ref> In August 2025 Lipowicz made his [[Penrith Panthers]] first-grade debut in the [[National Rugby League|NRL]] against the [[Canterbury Bulldogs]].<ref>[https://www.foxsports.com.au/nrl/nrl-premiership/teams/panthers/nrl-2025-zac-lipowicz-makes-panthers-debut-after-working-hard-as-a-carpenter/news-story/713860d010c75fb6409847481ac73ecd?fbclid=IwY2xjawPG_ZZleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETBFbW9KTlhYbzI3bmQ4R1lNc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHrpBEHeFgySI_ZxQJKFgAfjLWLPANO6T8iULYJHucwmuzNB9Cfy0s5FEV8eJ_aem_3MgQKq7ltmXPNq0qLCNmTQ Inside mud-covered carpenter’s rise from ‘overweight and lazy’ to ‘unreal’ Panthers debut]</ref> He was sin-binned in his first game in the top grade.<ref>[https://www.nrl.com/news/2025/08/28/zac-lipowicz-sent-to-the-bin/ Zac Lipowicz sent to the bin]</ref>

Lipowicz joined the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] on a two-year deal following the conclusion of his Penrith Panthers deal at the end of the [[2025 NRL season]].<ref>[https://www.zerotackle.com/players/zac-lipowicz/ Zac Lipowicz]</ref><ref>[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/articles-9/301-12873-dragons-sign-zac-lipowicz/ Dragons sign Zac Lipowicz]</ref>

===International career===
He made his international debut for [[Poland national rugby league team|Poland]] in October 2023, scoring a try in their 40–8 victory over [[North Macedonia national rugby league team|North Macedonia]].<ref>[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/catalans-dragons-recruitment-drive-continues-as-nrl-young-gun-signs Catalans Dragons’ recruitment drive continues as NRL young gun signs]</ref>
